accepted_human_dispositions.notes: Operator override: targeted VLM rejected only because watermarked_source_pdf was present. VLM accepted question boundary=true, diagram presence=true, cross-page continuity=n/a. The watermarked-shard contract treats a watermark as a review reason, not an automatic blocker, when the question is complete and legible and the watermark does not occlude required content. Original VLM notes: Watermark present at bottom (red text: '老师微信: liuxue119118...') violates clean-source requirement. Diagram is present and legible, question boundary intact, no cross-page continuity issue (single page). However, watermark constitutes a blocker per review reasons.
